creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
I'm not sure. We were testing with multiple users since this morning based on 0dddcc6576+a69d075e96a6 and I haven't gotten that stack trace again neither from the users nor from my main unit running it. It's not reliable confirmation yet but it looks better than 0dddcc6576 crashing regularly.

As for running pfsync_drop() now vs. not before it's interesting to note that a69d075e96a6 doesn't apply without 0dddcc6576 (same as 5f75cd390) and directly modifies that call as well.


Cheers,
Franco
